seoTitle: Dartnall vs Datatine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dartnall and Datatine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dartnall and Datatine.
heading: Dartnall vs Datatine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dartnall, Western Australia and Datatine, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dartnall has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Datatine (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dartnall or Datatine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dartnall has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Datatine scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dartnall scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Datatine scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dartnall or Datatine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dartnall has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
